question_text: Let 𝑈1, 𝑈2, 𝑈3 be three independent exponential random variables such that 𝑈𝑘 has the following probability density function 𝑓𝑘(𝑥) = {𝑘 𝑒−𝑘𝑥 if 𝑥> 0 0 otherwise, 𝑘= 1, 2, 3. Let 𝑋= min{𝑈1, 𝑈3} and 𝑌= min{𝑈2, 𝑈3} . Then 𝑃(𝑋= 𝑌) equals ______________ (rounded off to two decimal places).
